---
title: "SA_E1A — PNAS Figures"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE,
                      fig.width = 6, fig.height = 4, dpi = 300)
```

```{r config}
data_dir <- "/Users/dgkamper/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-dgkamper@gmail.com/My Drive/DGK Lab/Collaborations/BlankLang Lab/DGK Lab - BlankLangLab - Second Amendment Language Dependencies/Data/Study 1"

output_dir <- "/Users/dgkamper/Library/CloudStorage/GoogleDrive-dgkamper@gmail.com/My Drive/DGK Lab/Collaborations/BlankLang Lab/DGK Lab - BlankLangLab - Second Amendment Language Dependencies/Analysis/Study 1"

analytic_file       <- file.path(data_dir, "SA_E1A_analytic.csv")
classification_file <- file.path(data_dir, "SA_E1A_rewrite_classifications.csv")
fig_dir             <- file.path(output_dir, "figures_pnas")
dir.create(fig_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r libraries, message=FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
```

```{r load-data}
df <- read.csv(analytic_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
rewrite_codes <- read.csv(classification_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
df <- merge(df, rewrite_codes[, c("prolific_pid", "rewrite_code")],
            by = "prolific_pid", all.x = TRUE)

df$interpretation <- as.integer(df$interpretation)
df$confidence     <- as.integer(df$confidence)
df$remove         <- as.integer(df$remove)
df$comma_3v2      <- as.integer(df$comma_3v2)
df$comma_3v1      <- as.integer(df$comma_3v1)
df$comma_2v1      <- as.integer(df$comma_2v1)

df$interp_label <- factor(
  ifelse(df$interpretation == 2, "Categorical",
  ifelse(df$interpretation == 1, "Conditional", "Neither")),
  levels = c("Categorical", "Conditional", "Neither")
)
```

```{r theme}
# PNAS figures: no titles, no subtitles, clean axes, minimal ink.
# All explanatory text goes in the LaTeX caption.

col_cat  <- "#0072B2"
col_cond <- "#D55E00"
col_grey <- "#999999"

theme_pnas <- theme_classic(base_size = 11, base_family = "sans") +
  theme(
    axis.title       = element_text(size = 11),
    axis.text        = element_text(size = 10, color = "grey20"),
    axis.line        = element_line(linewidth = 0.4),
    axis.ticks       = element_line(linewidth = 0.3),
    panel.background = element_blank(),
    plot.background  = element_blank(),
    plot.margin      = margin(10, 10, 10, 10),
    legend.position  = "none"
  )
```


# Fig 1 — Interpretation Distribution

```{r fig1, fig.width=4.5, fig.height=3.5}
interp_summary <- df %>%
  count(interp_label) %>%
  mutate(
    prop = n / sum(n),
    label = paste0(sprintf("%.1f%%", prop * 100))
  )

fig1 <- ggplot(interp_summary, aes(x = interp_label, y = prop, fill = interp_label)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), vjust = -0.5, size = 3.5) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(col_cat, col_cond, col_grey)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(accuracy = 1),
                     limits = c(0, 1.0),
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(x = "Interpretation", y = "Proportion") +
  theme_pnas

print(fig1)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig1.pdf"), fig1, width = 4.5, height = 3.5)
```


# Fig 2 — Comma Sensitivity

```{r fig2, fig.width=4.5, fig.height=3.5}
comma_long <- df %>%
  select(prolific_pid, comma_3v2, comma_3v1, comma_2v1) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(comma_3v2, comma_3v1, comma_2v1),
               names_to = "comparison", values_to = "rating") %>%
  mutate(
    comparison = factor(comparison,
      levels = c("comma_3v2", "comma_3v1", "comma_2v1"),
      labels = c("3 vs. 2\n(1 removed)", 
                  "3 vs. 1\n(2 removed)",
                  "2 vs. 1\n(1 removed)"))
  )

comma_summary <- comma_long %>%
  group_by(comparison) %>%
  summarise(
    m = mean(rating),
    se = sd(rating) / sqrt(n()),
    lo = m - 1.96 * se,
    hi = m + 1.96 * se,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

fig2 <- ggplot(comma_summary, aes(x = comparison, y = m)) +
  geom_col(fill = col_cat, width = 0.55, alpha = 0.85) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lo, ymax = hi), width = 0.15, linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", m)), vjust = -2.2, size = 3.3) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 2.7), breaks = 1:4,
                     expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.05))) +
  labs(x = "Comma comparison", y = "Perceived meaning change (1\u20134)") +
  theme_pnas

print(fig2)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig2.pdf"), fig2, width = 4.5, height = 3.5)
```


# Fig 3 — Confidence by Group

```{r fig3, fig.width=4, fig.height=3.5}
df_conf <- df %>%
  filter(interpretation %in% c(1, 2)) %>%
  mutate(group = factor(ifelse(interpretation == 2, "Categorical", "Conditional"),
                        levels = c("Categorical", "Conditional")))

group_means <- df_conf %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(m = mean(confidence), .groups = "drop")

fig3 <- ggplot(df_conf, aes(x = group, y = confidence, fill = group)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.25, width = 0.7, color = NA) +
  geom_jitter(aes(color = group), width = 0.1, size = 1.3, alpha = 0.4) +
  geom_point(data = group_means, aes(y = m),
             shape = 18, size = 4, color = "black") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 4, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50", linewidth = 0.3) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(col_cat, col_cond)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(col_cat, col_cond)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = 1:7, limits = c(0.5, 7.5)) +
  labs(x = "Interpretation group", y = "Confidence (1\u20137)") +
  theme_pnas

print(fig3)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig3.pdf"), fig3, width = 4, height = 3.5)
```


# Fig 4 — Concordance Heatmap

```{r fig4, fig.width=5, fig.height=3}
cross_df <- df %>%
  filter(interpretation %in% c(1, 2)) %>%
  mutate(
    fc = factor(ifelse(interpretation == 2, "Categorical", "Conditional"),
                levels = c("Categorical", "Conditional")),
    rw = factor(rewrite_code, levels = c("categorical", "ambiguous", "conditional"))
  ) %>%
  count(fc, rw) %>%
  group_by(fc) %>%
  mutate(pct = n / sum(n) * 100, label = paste0(n, "\n(", sprintf("%.0f%%", pct), ")")) %>%
  ungroup()

# Fill in missing combos
all_combos <- expand.grid(
  fc = factor(c("Categorical", "Conditional"), levels = c("Categorical", "Conditional")),
  rw = factor(c("categorical", "ambiguous", "conditional"),
              levels = c("categorical", "ambiguous", "conditional")),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
cross_df <- merge(all_combos, cross_df, all = TRUE)
cross_df$n[is.na(cross_df$n)] <- 0
cross_df$pct[is.na(cross_df$pct)] <- 0
cross_df$label[is.na(cross_df$label)] <- "0\n(0%)"

fig4 <- ggplot(cross_df, aes(x = rw, y = fc, fill = n)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", linewidth = 1.5) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3.8, lineheight = 0.85) +
  scale_fill_gradient(low = "grey96", high = col_cat, guide = "none") +
  scale_x_discrete(labels = c("Categorical", "Ambiguous", "Conditional")) +
  labs(x = "Rewrite classification", y = "Forced-choice interpretation") +
  theme_pnas +
  theme(axis.line = element_blank(), axis.ticks = element_blank())

print(fig4)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig4.pdf"), fig4, width = 5, height = 3)
```


# Fig 5 — Removal Impact by Group

```{r fig5, fig.width=5, fig.height=4.5}
df_rem <- df %>%
  filter(interpretation %in% c(1, 2)) %>%
  mutate(group = factor(ifelse(interpretation == 2, "Categorical", "Conditional"),
                        levels = c("Categorical", "Conditional")))

group_means <- df_rem %>%
  group_by(group) %>%
  summarise(m = mean(remove), .groups = "drop")

fig5 <- ggplot(df_rem, aes(x = remove, fill = group)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, center = 0, alpha = 0.85,
                 color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(data = group_means, aes(xintercept = m),
             linewidth = 0.7, color = "black") +
  facet_wrap(~ group, ncol = 1, scales = "free_y") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(col_cat, col_cond), guide = "none") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:7,
    labels = c("1\nSame", "2", "3", "4\nMidpoint", "5", "6", "7\nCompletely\ndifferent")) +
  labs(x = "Removal impact", y = "Count") +
  theme_pnas +
  theme(strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 11))

print(fig5)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig5.pdf"), fig5, width = 5, height = 4.5)
```


# Fig 6 — Removal Impact Overall

```{r fig6, fig.width=5, fig.height=3}
fig6 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = remove)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 1, center = 0, fill = col_cat, alpha = 0.85,
                 color = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 4, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = mean(df$remove), linewidth = 0.7, color = "black") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:7,
    labels = c("1\nSame", "2", "3", "4\nMidpoint", "5", "6", "7\nCompletely\ndifferent")) +
  labs(x = "Removal impact", y = "Count") +
  theme_pnas

print(fig6)
ggsave(file.path(fig_dir, "Fig6.pdf"), fig6, width = 5, height = 3)
```


```{r done}
cat("Figures saved to:", fig_dir, "\n")
list.files(fig_dir, pattern = "\\.pdf$")
```
